text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 
72 
PTD_MDCR_PMT 
LABEL: 
Part D Medicare Payments 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount that the Part D plan covered for all covered drugs for a given year. The 
variable is calculated as the sum of the plan payments for covered PDEs (CVRD_D_PLAN_PD_AMT) and 
the low-income cost sharing subsidy amount (LICS_AMT) during the year. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PTD_MDCR_PMT
